home.badge: v0.2.0 · Gonka AI · did:key · Aptos Testnet
home.headline: Human Firewall for the Internet
home.subheadline: Prove you're human — with a gesture. No password, no email, no tracking.
home.tech_subtitle: Click a card to learn more
home.join_subtitle: We are building public infrastructure for a human internet

gesture.title: Gesture
gesture.subtitle: Human Expression
gesture.modal_body: You draw a line with mouse or finger. AI analyses not the shape but biometric movement parameters: speed variability, pauses, corrections, rhythm irregularity. Bots move perfectly — humans don't.

ai.title: Gonka AI
ai.subtitle: Qwen3-14B
ai.modal_body: Qwen3-14B (via OpenRouter) receives only the statistical gesture vector — no coordinates, no personal data. Evaluates 8 parameters and returns: is_human, confidence (0–1), reasoning. Threshold: 85%.

did.title: DID:key
did.subtitle: W3C Standard
did.modal_body: An Ed25519 key pair is generated in the browser. The public key is encoded as did:key following the W3C standard. No servers, no registration — the key lives only in your browser's localStorage.

aptos.title: Aptos
aptos.subtitle: Blockchain
aptos.modal_body: The SHA3-256 hash of the proof (ExpressionProof) is written to a Move smart contract on Aptos. The hash contains no personal data — only gesture statistics, session_id and a 1-hour time bucket. Immutable and verifiable.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Zero PII
privacy.modal_body: Raw coordinates are processed on-device only. Only the statistical vector (8 numbers) is sent to the server. Only the hash goes on-chain. No name, email, or IP is collected or stored.

bond.title: HSI Bond
bond.subtitle: Human Network
bond.modal_body: Verified humans can vouch for each other via HSI Bond. Each vouching strengthens the HumanCredential. Bots cannot receive vouching from real people — this is an additional layer of protection.

s01.title: Draw a gesture
s01.desc: A line or shape on screen — speed, pauses, rhythm

s03.title: DID generated
s03.desc: Ed25519 key in your browser — no servers

manifest_card.title: Manifest
manifest_card.body: Why we are building HSI, how it will change the internet and what place every human will have in it.

developers_card.title: Developers
developers_card.body: REST API, SDK, integration examples. Add human verification to your app in an hour.

donate_card.title: Support
donate_card.body: An open project without venture funding. Help us develop public infrastructure.

manifest.hero_subtitle: The internet was built by people — for people. It's time to protect that.
manifest.s1_p1: By 2025, most internet traffic is generated not by humans. Bots write comments, inflate votes, leave reviews, register accounts, participate in surveys. The digital space has lost its main property — it has stopped being human.
manifest.s1_p2: The problem is deeper than it seems. Existing solutions — CAPTCHA, SMS verification, KYC — are either easily bypassed or require identity disclosure. There is no open standard that allows proving humanity anonymously.
manifest.s1_p3: Anyone can create a thousand accounts. Any bot can write 'I am human'. No service today can verify this claim — without a passport, without surveillance, without a centralised database.
manifest.s2_p1: HSI (Homo Sapience Internet) is not a replacement for the internet. It is a protocol on top of IP, like HTTPS on top of HTTP. It adds one new primitive: HumanCredential — a cryptographically verified proof that a living human is behind an action.
manifest.s2_p2: Verification is based on movement biometrics, not identity. AI analyses the gesture — not coordinates, not shape, but statistics: speed variability, pause entropy, number of corrections, rhythm irregularity. This is what bots cannot imitate well enough.
s2_steps: User draws a gesture → statistics processed on-device
Anonymous vector (no coordinates) sent to Gonka AI
Result: is_human + confidence — no personal data
On success, Ed25519 DID is generated in browser
SHA3-256 hash of proof written to Aptos

apps.title: Forums & Platforms
apps.desc: SDK integrates in 2 lines of code. Spam disappears — not because it's blocked, but because there's no one to write it. Ratings, votes and likes again reflect real human opinion.

apps.title: DAO & Voting
apps.desc: One human, one vote. No Sybil attacks, no ballot stuffing. Governance tokens are protected not just by quantity, but by proof of humanity.

apps.title: Chats & Comments
apps.desc: A verified Human badge appears for real people. Discussion quality changes instantly — not through censorship, but through trust in the source.

apps.title: Marketplaces
apps.desc: Reviews are left by real buyers, not competitor bots. Ratings work again as a quality indicator.

apps.title: Education
apps.desc: The exam was passed by a human, not GPT. An online diploma makes sense when there's proof of who earned it.

apps.title: AI Agents
apps.desc: Paradox: HSI helps AI agents act correctly. An agent can prove it acts on behalf of a verified human — with their explicit permission.

manifest.s4_p1: HSI exists as an open protocol with several tiers. Verification for humans is always free. This is a principle: a human should not pay to prove their humanity.
manifest.s4_p2: Platforms pay for verifying their users — just as they now pay for reCAPTCHA and fraud detection, but more honestly, transparently and without sharing data with third parties.
manifest.s5_p1: Early adopters are communities already hurting from bots. Developers on GitHub, authors on Reddit, DAO members in Web3, forum moderators. For them, verification is not a barrier — it's a privilege.
manifest.s5_p2: The Verified Human badge on a profile is the new blue checkmark that can't be bought. It can't be faked or transferred. It proves not fame — but existence.
manifest.s5_p3: The network grows through HSI Bond: verified humans can vouch for each other, strengthening their credential. Social trust becomes cryptographically verifiable.
manifest.quote: "The internet isn't broken — it just doesn't know who you are. APTOGON fixes that."

developers.hero_subtitle: Add human verification to your app. REST API compatible with any stack.
developers.ep3_returns: attempts[] with gesture pattern and AI result

features.title: Zero PII
features.desc: Raw gesture coordinates never leave the browser. Only statistics go to the server.

features.title: W3C DID
features.desc: Compatible with the did:key standard. Works with any identity system.

features.title: On-chain proof
features.desc: Move contract on Aptos. Verification without our server — fully decentralised.

features.title: Accessibility
features.desc: Accounts for motor impairments. People with tremors are never blocked.

features.title: Fast
features.desc: Median 800ms. Gonka AI with fallback — works even when service is unavailable.

features.title: Verifiable Credential
features.desc: W3C VC format. Signed with Ed25519. Expires in 30 days, auto-renewed.

developers.cta_subtitle: Contact us — we'll set up an API key and help with integration

donate.hero_subtitle: APTOGON is an open project without venture funding. We are building public infrastructure for a human internet.

funds.title: Gonka AI inference
funds.desc: Paying for Qwen3-14B requests via OpenRouter for gesture analysis

funds.title: Hosting & infrastructure
funds.desc: FastAPI backend, Aptos transactions, CDN for frontend

donate.russia_desc: Quick transfer via Tinkoff Pay, SBP or any Russian bank card
donate.crypto_eth_desc: Write to hello@homosapience.org — we'll send the address
donate.contact_desc: We'll discuss terms, provide early API access and help integrate verification into your product

verify.hero_subtitle: No passport · No camera · No personal data

steps.title: Draw a symbol
steps.desc: Anything — a letter, digit, curl. AI watches how you draw, not what

steps.title: Gonka AI
steps.desc: Analyses rhythm, speed, pauses. Bots move too smoothly — that gives them away

steps.title: Your DID
steps.desc: A digital key is created in your browser. Your anonymous ID — like a passport but without a name

steps.title: Aptos
steps.desc: The verification fact is written to the blockchain. Not data — just a cryptographic proof

verify.canvas_subtitle: with mouse or finger — any symbol
verify.analyzing_subtitle: The model is studying your gesture pattern
verify.did_what_value: Like a passport but digital and completely anonymous
verify.did_where_value: Only in your browser (localStorage). Nowhere on servers
verify.did_key_value: Only yours. No one can use it
verify.did_gen_value: Right in browser, in 1ms, no server request
verify.aptos_no_key: Credential saved locally. Add APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY for on-chain recording.
verify.aptos_note: 📌 Only the fact of verification is recorded on-chain — no personal data, just a hash
verify.bond_desc: This protects against bots that passed the gesture test. Guarantors are real people from the HSI network who vouch with their reputation.
verify.bonding_subtitle: Gonka BondMatcher is selecting people by network reputation
verify.complete_subtitle: You are a full member of the HSI network
verify.failed_tip: 💡 Tip: draw longer (1–3 sec), pause between points — rhythm irregularity signals a human
verify.footer_note: 🔒 Coordinates destroyed in browser · only math goes to network · no biometrics
